_comment: agent-bridge routing rules. Copy to %USERPROFILE%\.agent-bridge\routing-rules.json. Loaded by both agents on session start.

learned_triggers._comment: Example: user had to manually paste an implementation summary after Codex changed bridge tooling.
learned_triggers.pattern: When Codex changes bridge tooling and asks for Claude review, send AUDIT_REQUEST automatically.
learned_triggers.reason: User manually pasted it; should auto-send next time.

suppressed_triggers._comment: Example: user said stop sending routine ACKs.
suppressed_triggers.pattern: Routine acknowledgement with no new action, decision, or state change.
suppressed_triggers.rule: Do not auto-bridge routine acknowledgements unless they change state or unblock work.
